items.title: U.S. and European interests are 'intertwined', Rubio says
items.description: Speaking at the Munich Security Conference, the U.S. secretary of state stressed the importance of cooperation with Europe.

items.title: What's next for Cuba? Trump turns the screws as the island runs out of jet fuel
items.description: Cuba’s government appears to be on the brink of economic collapse amid a worsening energy crisis.

items.title: Trump says he will issue executive order to get voter-ID requirements before midterms
items.description: President Donald Trump proclaims that he will find a way to implement national voter-ID requirements by November's elections.
